title: Varaždin、Varaždin — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Varaždin、Varaždinの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

VaraždinはVaraždinにある人口46,946の都市です。The Baroque capital of Croatia, a beautifully preserved city with stunning Rococo architecture, the Varaždin Castle, and the famous Špancirfest street festival.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
